summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Arthur portfolio. All 5 backend pytest tests pass and all 10 frontend UI flows verified working end-to-end.

issues: Framer Motion warning: container needs non-static position for scroll offset calc (non-blocking console warning)

action_items: Optional: fix Framer Motion 'container has a non-static position' console warning on Skills page (add relative/absolute to scroll container).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined at bottom but referenced at line 129 inside create_contact — if resend fails before logger init in module ordering it would NameError. Currently logger is used only after include_router but module executes top-to-bottom; logger.error works because it's called at request time. Still, move logging.basicConfig/logger definition to top for clarity.
Contact HTML email is built by string interpolation of user input — XSS/HTML injection risk when Resend is enabled. Escape name/subject/message before injecting into HTML.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec (browsers ignore credentials). Fine for public API but flag it.
seed_data_creation: One TEST_Playwright contact message inserted via UI test and one TEST_User via pytest (both stored in Mongo contact_messages)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints: GET /api/, POST /api/contact (EmailStr validation), GET /api/contact/messages, GET /api/cv (PDF via reportlab). RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty so email_sent=false is EXPECTED. All frontend routes work: /, /sobre, /projetos, /videos, /fotografia, /competencias, /contacto. All data-testids are in place. CV download works via /api/cv returning application/pdf.
